review.duplicateDescription:
**⚠️ Existing entry found. Data will be updated.**
Review the data before confirming.
review.normalDescription: Please review the extracted data below. Ensure all values are correct before accepting.
review.notesFallback: Use 'Add Note' button to attach a note

messages.interactionInvalid: This interaction is no longer valid.
messages.sessionExpiredStart: Session expired. Please start again with /track.
messages.cloudUnavailable: Cloud sync is currently unavailable. Your run is safely stored locally and will upload automatically when cloud is reachable again.
messages.submissionFailedPrefix: Run submission failed. Please try again.
messages.successNavigationDefault: Return to /track to log another run.

initialMenu.title: 📊 The Tower Run Tracker
initialMenu.welcomeBackTemplate:
Welcome back, <@{userId}>!
You've logged **{totalRuns}** runs.

**Here is your last run:**
initialMenu.welcomeNewTemplate: Welcome to the Tower Tracker, <@{userId}>! Log and analyze your runs.

options.name: 📤 Upload
options.value: Paste or Scan your Battle Report. You can also attach a screenshot when you paste.

options.name: 📝 Manual Entry
options.value: Manually enter all run details if you prefer not to use paste or OCR.

options.name: 📢 Share Last Run
options.value: Share your last logged run with others in the channel.

options.name: ✏️ Edit Last
options.value: Edit the most recent run you logged. Lets you quickly fix mistakes or update notes.

options.name: 🗑️ Remove Last
options.value: Remove your most recent logged run with confirmation.

options.name: 📈 View Runs
options.value: View and analyze your previous runs with charts, tables, and filters.

options.name: 🔗 Web Tracker
options.value: Open your personal tracker website to view, edit, and analyze your runs.

options.name: 🎟️ Support
options.value: Go to the Tracker Discord server to make a ticket or ask for help.

options.name: ⚙️ Settings
options.value: Configure tracker options such as scan language, timezone, and more.

initialMenu.footer: Use Creator Code "JDEVO" to Support The Tower Run Tracker!

submission.title: The Tower Run Tracker
submission.descriptionLogged:
✅ Run **logged** successfully!

You have now logged **{totalRuns}** total runs.
submission.descriptionUpdated:
✅ Run **updated** successfully!

You have now logged **{totalRuns}** total runs.
submission.footer:
Run logged. Use buttons below or start a new /track.

Use Creator Code "JDEVO" to Support The Tower Run Tracker!

tipsLines: • Ensure text is clear and readable
